# TagLogger

> AirTag-based asset tracking for operations teams. Track tools, vehicles, and field equipment with location history, geofence alerts, and inventory workflows — without heavy GPS hardware overhead.

TagLogger ships pre-configured AirTag hardware (not standard consumer AirTags) with a web platform used by teams in construction, logistics, healthcare, equipment rental, and recycling. An independent service, not affiliated with Apple Inc.

## Hardware

- [Standard Tag — $15](https://taglogger.com/#pricing): compact, up to 1-year battery (CR2032)
- [Standard Tag + Magnetic Holder — $21](https://taglogger.com/#pricing): magnetic mount for tools and vehicles
- [Tag + Extended Battery Case — $45](https://taglogger.com/#pricing): up to 10-year battery on two AA cells

Monthly subscription starts at $10. Free U.S. shipping.
